description: LocationIQ provides location data services including geocoding, reverse geocoding, routing, timezone lookup, nearby place search, and map tiles/static maps. It is used by developers to add address lookup, routing, and map rendering to applications.
summary: LocationIQ exposes two public HTTP integration surfaces: its core geocoding/routing/timezone REST API at `https://us1.locationiq.com/v1` and its map tile/static map HTTP endpoints; both require a LocationIQ access token passed as the `key` query parameter. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
